rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the appropriate component scope: type for interface behaviors, implementation for bindings.
Use exact names from the AADL model when referencing ports, components, and properties.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be scoped to their owning component declaration.
Assumptions and guarantees referring to ports belong in component type scopes.
Assignments and bindings must be placed in implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Avoid referencing undefined or non-visible identifiers in AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
